description: Volume create: label-required, region-or-linode_id, and size-below-10GB rejections plus the POST body. Both languages omit size when the caller does not supply it (API defaults to 20 GB); a supplied size is sent verbatim.

cases.name: requires region or linode_id
cases.expect_error: either region or linode_id is required

cases.name: rejects size below 10 GB
cases.expect_error: volume size must be at least 10 GB

cases.name: creates a volume with the API default size
creates a volume with an explicit size
requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This operation creates a billable resource. Set confirm=true to proceed.
